content:
[{'text': "The robot is back on white space in the upper corridor. The arrow is pointing north (up). I can see the robot is at the edge of the upper corridor, just above the black wall. 

Looking at the map carefully:
- The robot is at (4.56, 11.74) — in the upper white corridor
- The green destination is at (3.98, 7.87) — in the middle white corridor
- There's a large black band between the two corridors
- I need to find a vertical passage (gap) in the black wall

The map shows the black wall between corridors appears solid in this area. I need to look for a gap. Let me check if there's a passage on the left side (west) of the map. Let me rotate to face west and move further left to find a gap.

Currently facing north (~107°). I need to face west (~180°). Rotate right (clockwise) by about 90°.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_0198hD5NnEJF4ptcbq5achqR', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': -90}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
